Snip
GitHub
Free & open source

Short links. Sharp results.

Snip turns messy URLs into clean, trackable links — with custom slugs, expiry, and click analytics.

No sign-up requiredSession-based historyHTTPS only

Instant

Links created in milliseconds. No friction.

Click Tracking

Track visits per link with device data.

Expiry Control

Set links to expire in 1h, 24h, 7d, or 30d.

Custom Slugs

Choose your own memorable short code.
